description: Accumulate a4/ .md edits during a session (PostToolUse), validate them at Stop, and sweep records at SessionStart/SessionEnd. Session-scoped record at .claude/tmp/a4-edited/a4-edited-<session_id>.txt avoids re-reporting pre-existing violations in files the user did not touch. Separately, (a) report cross-file status consistency mismatches on SessionStart and after any a4/ .md edit (non-blocking, informational) and (b) propagate `superseded` status to predecessor decision files when a successor reaches `final` (non-blocking, actively writes). Usecase status transitions and their cascades run synchronously from `scripts/transition_status.py` inside the invoking skill/agent — there is no UC-specific hook.

hooks.description: Record edited a4/*.md files to a session-scoped list
Propagate `superseded` status to predecessor decision files via supersedes: (idempotent, in-place writes). UC cascade runs from transition_status.py, not this hook.
Validate all a4/ files edited this session; exit 2 on violations to force fix
Delete this session's a4-edited record file
Sweep orphan a4-edited record files older than 1 day
Report cross-file status-consistency mismatches at session start
